results.title: Chickens being raised at Punjab University’s Electrical Engineering Dept
results.description: The Punjab University is in the news again and it was revealed that chickens were being raised illegally in an official building of Electrical Engineering Department of the university, reported 24NewsHD TV channel on Saturday.

results.title: Judge tosses remnants of Proud Boys seditious conspiracy case after Trump’s broad clemency
results.description: The judge stressed that his order should not be mistaken as an endorsement of the Department of Justice’s decision to abandon the case.

results.title: Punjab Congress rival faction meets Baghel, sticks to demand for Warring’s replacement
results.description: Chandigarh, July 11 (SocialNews.XYZ) A long-awaited meeting was held on Saturday between the rival Punjab Congress faction led by former Chief Minister Charanjit Singh Channi, comprising several sitting and former lawmakers, and the party’s general... The post Punjab Congress rival faction meets Baghel, sticks to demand for Warring’s replacement appeared first on Social News XYZ .
